ads.author: Dan Furlong
ads.title: Original Donkey Kong TKG3 Arcade Machine
ads.description: Price: $3000 OBO ________________________________________ Rare Red Donkey Kong (TKG3) Arcade – Original Nintendo Cabinet This is one of the hardest-to-find variations of Donkey Kong — the TKG3 red cabinet model. Out of roughly 80,000–100,000 Donkey Kong machines produced, only an estimated 1,500–2,500 were originally manufactured in red (about 2–3%). These were among the earliest production units, making them highly sought after by collectors today. This machine is an authentic, original Nintendo cabinet from the early 1980s — not a reproduction — and is serial number 2344, which highlights just how early this unit is. Read more about the history of the DK TKG3 machines with red cabinets here: https://www.vintagearcadegal.com/post/a-definitive-guide-to-donkey-kong-red-cabinets-and-other-variations ________________________________________ Condition & Hardware • Original 4-board set included (working, but occasionally temperamental) • Original power supply – still works, but installed new, version that is considered more stable • Original Sanyo CRT monitor – bright, clear, and authentic • Cabinet retains original components and structure • Has original name plate on the back To ensure reliable gameplay, I installed: • A modern 50-game board • A new power supply • A new video/audio board (improves sound clarity) The best part: All upgrades are completely reversible. No wires were cut — everything is plug-and-play. You can easily return the machine to its original configuration. Or, you can upgrade to a new LCD flat screen that is supported by the new video board, but I prefer to keep the original monitor as do most collectors. Note: The original boards likely just need cleaning/service (~$150) to improve consistency. ________________________________________ Cabinet Details • Original bezel, marquee, and control panel in great condition • 7-slot speaker grille (correct for this production period) • Accepts coins or free play • Includes all original keys As an early-production unit, this machine: • Does NOT include trademark symbols on the bezel/side art • Reflects authentic early manufacturing details collectors value ________________________________________ Cosmetic Notes • Side laminate and trim show wear • I intentionally left these original for authenticity If desired, I can replace the laminate and trim for $1,500, but many collectors prefer preserving originality. ________________________________________ Why This Machine Stands Out • Extremely rare TKG3 red cabinet • Early serial number (#2344) • Original hardware included + modern reliability upgrades • Fully reversible modifications • True collector’s piece with historical significance ________________________________________ Additional Info I’m happy to provide interior photos and answer any questions. This is a functional piece of arcade history — whether you’re a serious collector or just want an incredible centerpiece, this machine delivers both authenticity and playability. ________________________________________ Message me for details, pricing, or to see it in person.

ads.author: Steven G Cordes
ads.title: Piece of local history
ads.description: Hi,this is Stephen Cordes from Global Recycling Network / #SCRAPGUYZ. We had an interesting job today at the historic Arcade Building (Orange Ave & US1). We were called to remove a massive antique iron statue that fell and broke into a few pieces. It's too beautiful to scrap—my team is confident it can be restored. Dee, who called us out, says it’s over 100 years old and originally imported from Europe. Because of its local history, I’d love to save it. Do you know anyone who might want it? We are open to donating it to the local historical society, or selling it to an interested private collector who appreciates local history. Only looking for $300. To cover the costs of pick up and removal, We can deliver locally but you will need Have a way to unload it as it is over 800 lb

ads.author: Gary Otto
ads.title: 007 Goldeneye Pinball machine (1996) by SEGA - James Bond
ads.description: James Bond 007 Goldeneye pinball. Produced by Sega in 1996. It is It is in great condition. Fully shopped / refurbished and upgraded with a full LED lit playfield. Everything is calibrated and works properly as it should (Magnets, satellite, etc) Very nice player's condition SEGA 007 Goldeneye! The game has been gone through and shopped out with rubbers, rebuilt flippers and LEDs. The driver board has been rebuilt, the sound board has been recapped, the CPU is a brand new replacement, all mechanisms have been taken apart and cleaned, with parts changed as needed. The multi-ball reel lock has a brand new belt on it. The playfield is in fantastic shape for this title. The game plays great! It has a custom made, extra thick, anti-reflective glass i got specially cut that will support the weight of my cats that jump on it (I had it made for this purpose) - the gun trigger and many of the unique parts like the satellite were replaced with new-old stock from Sega- all official Sega stock. There are just a handful of these left in the United States with most in the hands of private collectors. I have the key for the coin slot, key for the head board, original manual & it is updated to the most current rom. $3800 price is firm - Serious inquiry only. Will accept cash or Zelle only. You would need to come pick it up. I live in Haines City, Florida just outside of Orlando.

ads.author: Michelle Lynn
ads.title: Mixed video game and cards lot
ads.description: Massive mixed video game & trading card collection lot – everything pictured is included. This is a big, varied lot perfect for a collector, reseller, family, retro gamer, or someone wanting to start/expand a card collection in one purchase. Tested & Working Items: -Original Nintendo Entertainment System (NES-001): Console powers on cleanly. The front red power indicator light blinks steadily when powered on without a cartridge inside, which (according to the internet) means the standard 10NES internal lockout chip cycle is functioning normally. Includes original controller and power plug. Good cosmetic shape. Untested for actual gameplay because no cartridges are included in this lot. -Pink Nintendo DS: Works well. Includes original charger, stylus, and game case. Several DS game cartridges are also included (see photos). -Video Games (CIB/cases where shown): --Large selection of popular titles across platforms. Games all worked fine when last played and have been in storage since. Includes: -PS4: Grand Theft Auto V -Xbox 360: Halo 3 Essentials, The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion, Xbox Live Arcade compilation -PS3: Multiple Call of Duty titles (Black Ops II, Modern Warfare 2, Advanced Warfare, etc.), Fallout New Vegas, The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim, Borderlands Game of the Year Edition, Battlefield 3, Metal Gear Rising: Revengeance -Wii/Wii U: Mario Kart 8, Wii Sports Club, LEGO Jurassic World -PC: Command & Conquer: The First Decade -Plus more titles visible in the photos (stacks and individual cases shown). Accessories & Extras: -2black game controllers ps4 -White iPad (older model) powers on and functions- no charger -Ken Griffey Jr. commemorative plaque- (random I know lol) Action figures (hulk plush & fortnite character) Various other small items and packaging shown in photos Trading Cards (big mixed lot – sold as-is): Large quantity of trading cards exactly as pictured. Includes: -Pokémon cards (many in protective sleeves, some in hard plastic cases with labels/QR codes, holo/reverse holo cards, bags marked “All Holo,” “Kanto,” etc.) -Magic: The Gathering (MTG) cards – decks, bulk, and boosters (including Strixhaven) One Piece cards Other mixed cards I have no expertise in evaluating trading cards and found it exhausting to try to identify or price individual cards, so they are being sold as part of this big lot exactly as pictured. No guarantees on specific cards, rarity, condition, or value. What you see is what you get. Please review all card photos carefully. Condition Notes: Most items are in good used condition from storage. Expect normal wear on game cases, controllers, and boxes. Everything is sold as-is. Photos show the full lot from multiple angles – please zoom in and review everything carefully before purchasing. Shipping & Pickup: This is a heavy lot -U.S. Shipping will be available via calculated shipping once you provide you zip code. This will be at buyers expense. -Local pickup in the Southaven, MS / Memphis, TN area is welcome and preferred (saves on shipping and hassle). Great one-lot opportunity to get a big mix of working consoles, popular games across generations, controllers, and a substantial trading card collection without having to hunt for everything separately. Buy all, keep what you want and resell the items you dont. Questions? Feel free to message me. Thanks for looking!

ads.author: Gene Langheld
ads.title: 1974 Gottlieb Top Card pinball machine
ads.description: Up for sale is a beautiful 1974 Gottlieb Top Card pinball machine. I am listing this machine, along with another pitch and bat machine for a friend who is not on social media. This game has undergone a ground up restoration, with the cabinet being repainted using professional stencils back to its original graphics. The game has been cleaned and restored mechanically and plays great! The playfield is in great condition, as is the back glass. This game was originally purchased from an operator who removed it from his route back in the day, after only a few months, due to someone damaging the front door in an attempt to break it. The game only has 13,xxx plays on it, due to being in storage for 50 years. The game has a new reproduction front door, legs, and many other parts. It is a beautiful game which must be seen in person and played. If interested, please contact me and I can put you in touch with the owner for any arrangements. Asking $1,900 OBO. Cash only. Pick up in Flagler Beach, FL.

ads.author: John Enamait
ads.title: Boppin' Bugs Full-Size Arcade Game – WORKS – Set to Free Play
ads.description: For sale is a full-size commercial arcade game: Boppin’ Bugs. This is a genuine coin-op arcade cabinet—not a toy, not a countertop game. The game works properly and is currently set to free play. Lights, sounds, digital score display, and gameplay all function as they should. I have a video of the game operating and can send it to serious buyers. Condition (please read): This is a used arcade machine and it shows its age cosmetically. Expect scuffs, wear, and cosmetic imperfections consistent with a real arcade game that was played and enjoyed. Structurally solid and fully playable. Nothing is being hidden—photos accurately reflect condition. Details: • Full-size commercial arcade cabinet • Works and plays correctly • Currently set to free play • Coin door installed (50¢ mech present) • Key included for rear cabinet • No key for front coin mechanism • Solid wood construction • Great for a game room, basement, garage, church, daycare, brewery, or rec space Pickup / Logistics: • Local pickup only • Large and heavy cabinet—bring appropriate help and vehicle • I can assist with basic loading, but cannot deliver or ship Other Notes: • Sold as-is due to age (standard for arcade equipment) • No trades • If the listing is up, it’s still available This is a fun, eye-catching arcade piece that still works and is a blast to play. Priced fairly at $850.

Features: * Valley Cougar Darts electronic scoring system * Multiple game modes including Cricket and 301/501-style games * Automatic scorekeeping * Full-size commercial cabinet * Coin door and original controls intact * Bright LED scoring display * Soft-tip dart board * Sturdy, heavy-duty construction Condition: * Displays and controls function properly * Normal cosmetic wear consistent with age * Ready to play Dimensions: Approximately 7 ft tall This is a hard-to-find commercial dart machine that brings the arcade/bar experience home. ads.title: Dirty Drivin' Arcade driving machine from Raw Thrills
ads.description: This game is a blast to play and is ready for your game room, arcade, Family Entertainment Center, or business! It has 14 tracks, 10 cars to choose from, and plays on a 42” flat screen display. The game's main music track played throughout the game is More Human than Human by White Zombie.the game is on wheels and can be put through most doorways and easily repositionable. I am a professional amusement machine repair man. I’ve gone through this machine from top to bottom, cleaning, adjusting, and replacing parts as necessary. It has a new steering wheel, new drive belt, new Pioneer Coaxial 4-way speakers, new seat adjuster springs. I also went through the CPU, cleaning and reapplying heat sink compound to the CPU, testing all connections, and replacing the back-up battery. All of the serial numbers match on this game, for all of the major assemblies, circuit boards, CPU, and other miscellanies. It can be set for Free Play or it can run on quarters, tokens, card readers, or I can affix a dollar bill acceptor for a fee. The manual and back up CD set are also included. It can also be linked to other of the same game for multiplayer play (up to 8 players). Local delivery for a fee or I can help arrange shipping for the buyer.

ads.author: John Eric Booth
ads.title: Fully Restored - Operation Thunderbolt Arcade Shooter Game
ads.description: Hey John here from Gameroom Medic! Here is an incredible, fully restored Taito "Operation Thunderbolt" 2-player arcade game from my own collection. It's amazing! This will make someone an outstanding addition to their home arcade and take advantage of a great opportunity! This game is awesome! Last year I performed an intensive, full restoration on this machine... ya gotta see it in person to fully appreciate. This one's from 1989 and let me tell ya, you'd think it's brand new. The coin door was completely disassembled and repainted as well as all coin mechanism parts working perfectly, along with sparkling new vinyl cabinet artwork throughout. Several improvements were made as well including new upper speakers and the addition of a mid-bass speaker and amplifier for added impact! An aluminum footrest (one of my signature mods) replaced the plastic version. New dolly-style casters have been installed. A 25" minty fresh Wells Gardner K7000 monitor provides a stunning picture. The color is vibrant and screen is crystal clear... no burn in! The Uzi machine guns have both been completely disassembled and cleaned. New potentiometers were installed as well. The recoil feature is super fun and works beautifully! Inside the unit is equally impressive. Completely cleaned and painted along with cleaned wiring harnesses. A new power supply has been installed and main PC board fully recapped. This is without a doubt an archive quality machine, completely solid and ready for great game play. I challenge you to find this game in equal condition anywhere! No trades. Cash only. I hate to see this one go but I just don't have room for it. It's big! And heavy! Delivery can be provided but rental of a full liftgate box truck will be necessary. I will not respond to auto-generated messages such as "is this available?" Serious inquiries only please. I welcome your questions, and any respectable offers.

Neo-Geo machines are known for legendary fighting games like King of Fighters, Samurai Shodown, Metal Slug, Fatal Fury, and Art of Fighting. This is a 2-player upright cabinet with: • Original Neo-Geo marquee • Dual joysticks and buttons • CRT arcade monitor • Coin door intact • Authentic SNK branding • Multi-slot MVS style setup (can run multiple Neo-Geo cartridges) The machine powers on and works. It has cosmetic wear consistent with age (scratches, scuffs, fading), which adds to the authentic arcade look. Perfect for a game room, garage, man cave, or collector. These cabinets are becoming harder to find and are very popular with retro arcade collectors.

ads.description: Designed for four players The playfield simulates fire effects. The player must quickly put out fires when they appear in various places on the playfield by either completing a A. Bank of targets or making a lit shot includes instruction manual. The machine is themed around firefighting, with a unique playfield design that simulates extinguishing fires Repair The Williams Fire! pinball machine, released in 1987, is a firefighting themed game that challenges players to extinguish fires as they randomly break out across the playfield. This machine, designed by pinball legend Barry Oursler, distinguishes itself through a symmetrical playfield layout that intentionally omits traditional pop bumpers. How does the Williams Fire rescue siren effect work during multiball? Feature Description Highlight Mechanical Bell A real brass bell located at the top of the backbox rings during play to enhance the sound . SO SO MUCH FUN TO PLAY IN EXCELLENT WORKING SHAPE, $1500 spent on recent interior restoration. Msg now for more detail details

ads.title: Upright GameMaster 2 Player Arcade Machine
ads.description: New Console - Never Used - Originally Paid $3,100 in April 2025 - Still On Original Shipping Pallet Disclosure - the button all the way to the left has an LED that is out. Play Thousands of Games – Packed with 7,000+ classic and modern arcade titles, giving you endless hours of entertainment. Authentic Arcade Feel – Experience real arcade controls with two-player joysticks, 6 Action plus coin/start LED buttons per player, and a color-changing 3-inch trackball. Massive 32” HD Display – Crystal-clear gameplay that makes every pixel pop. No Coin Required! – No need to fish for quarters—this version is all about pure, unlimited play! GRS Linux Build – Arrives fully built and ready to go—just unbox, plug in, and start gaming. ArcadePro Mobility+ Package (Included!) Dynamic LED Lighting – Vibrant, customizable glow beneath the arcade for the ultimate ambiance. Slimline Design – Space-saving yet full-sized, fits seamlessly into any room. DynamicLock Casters – Easy to move, then lock in place for intense gaming sessions. UltraReinforce Kit – Built tough with extra bracketing for unmatched durability. Removable Plex – Keep your screen pristine with easy-to-clean removable plexiglass. Plug & Play Convenience – Arrives fully built and ready to go—just unbox, plug in, and start gaming. Guitar Hero Accessories Included PC Upgrade For the ultimate arcade experience, upgraded to Windows 11 PC. Featuring an Intel i5 processor, 16GB of RAM, and a dedicated Nvidia 1030 GPU, this option provides top-tier performance. The Windows 11 PC supports multiple HDMI outputs, making it ideal for digital marquees and multi-monitor setups. It also includes a 1TB SSD for ample storage. This setup is perfect for playing more demanding games, including high-demand MAME games, pinball, guns, and a curated selection of PC games such as Clone Hero, Contra Operation Galaga, Ghosts n Goblins Resurrection, Mortal Kombat Komplete, and more. This upgrade has been added for the best performance and gaming experience. Whether you’re reliving the golden age of gaming or creating new memories, this arcade brings the fun, no quarters needed! Dimensions: 31.5′′ W x 69′′ H x 26.25′′ D | Weight: ~180 lbs Local Pick Up Preferred Otherwise Buyer Responsible for Shipping

ads.author: Gary Otto
ads.title: James Bond GOLDENEYE Pinball by SEGA (1996)
ads.description: James Bond 007 Goldeneye pinball. Produced by Sega in 1996. It is It is in great condition. Fully shopped / refurbished and upgraded with a full LED lit playfield. Everything is calibrated and works properly as it should (Magnets, satellite, etc) Very nice player's condition SEGA 007 Goldeneye! The game has been gone through and shopped out with rubbers, rebuilt flippers and LEDs. The driver board has been rebuilt, the sound board has been recapped, the CPU is a brand new replacement, all mechanisms have been taken apart and cleaned, with parts changed as needed. The multi-ball reel lock has a brand new belt on it. The playfield is in fantastic shape for this title. The game plays great! It has a custom made, extra thick, anti-reflective glass i got specially cut that will support the weight of my cats that jump on it (I had it made for this purpose) - the gun trigger and many of the unique parts like the satellite were replaced with new-old stock from Sega- all official Sega stock. There are just a handful of these left in the United States with most in the hands of private collectors. I have the key for the coin slot, original manual & it is updated to the last available and most current rom. $3800 price is firm - Serious inquiry only. Will accept cash or Zelle only. You would need to come pick it up. I live in Haines City, Florida just outside of Orlando.

ads.author: Lena Hall
ads.title: Sargent & Greenleaf high-security lock change keys
ads.description: Safe Change Keys: These are specialized tools used by locksmiths and safe specialists to change the combination on safe locks.Tension Tools: Several L-shaped wires and other tools are likely tension tools used in lock picking, applied to turn the lock cylinder while manipulating the pins or levers.Sargent & Greenleaf (S&G) vault lock change keyTension Wrenches & L-Pins (Left & Center-Left)A loose mix of roughly 8-10 tension bars and emergency release wires. double-bitted safe keys, often referred to as lever safe keys.commonly used for old cabinets, diaries, or internal doors.Bicycle Security: Standard design for heavy-duty U-locks (e.g., older Kryptonite styles).Vending & Arcade: Used to secure coin mechanisms and machines.Automotive: Found in steering wheel club locks and motorcycle ignition switches.Elevators: Controls specific floor access or maintenance overrides. It arrived with some playfield damage that the owner of Pinball Adventures said he'd take care of. Sadly, Andrew McBain never did honor his promises to send a new playfield. So, the game still has the damage. They were supposed to make 10 of these engraved editions but I think they only made 1 or 2. It might be one of the rarest games on pinside. If you look at the engraved edition you will see only 1 person has this game in their collection. I don't think there's another pinball game on pinside that has only 1 owner. If you want to own a game no one else has, this is it!

ads.author: Tom Grizzard
ads.title: 1992 Konami X-Men video arcade (PLEASE READ COMMENTS)
ads.description: 1992 Konami X-Men video arcade game is a retro collectible arcade gaming machine that allows players to experience the popular X-Men franchise through interactive gameplay. With Konami's reputation for quality and innovation, this arcade game offers a nostalgic gaming experience for fans of the series and collectors of vintage arcade machines. Featuring the iconic X-Men characters and storyline, this video arcade game is a must-have for any gaming enthusiast looking to add a piece of arcade history to their collection. THE GOOD: Cabinet is in great overall condition. Monitor has no issues. Joysticks work fine, might be loose for some likeness/favor but nothing a new centering grommet would not solve... and not seized for removal as I did remove to clean and made adjustments, and shafts were cleaned well so wouldn't seize in near future (for easy removal). THE BAD: Original gameboard took a dump on me, and cost to replace is hovering around $1000.00... so, I installed a Pandora's DX box (turning off all games except X-men, so boots directly into game) and wiring the player 3 and player 4 control in via two "USB Joystick" pcb wiring adapters. The Pandora DX does support 4 players in Konomi X-Men with only one quirk that is not an issue... when you start either player three or player four you get player three, followed by player four... no big deal at all... besides that one super minor quirk everything works as it should. To be clear, you can play a three player or a four player game no problem, and you can pick who is each... you just get player 3 controls first regardless if you hit player 3 or player 4 start, followed by play 4 controls if you hit either player 3 or player 4 start after starting a 3 player game first. I see no sound or video issues WHATSOEVER playing X-Men on the Pandora's Box DX... NONE! As a convenience, I added 4 free-play buttons just above each of the coin chutes (small red start push buttons like on 1980's midway cocktail tables, barely noticeable) on the two top coindoors for any home user purchase.... those can easily be taken disabled and the coin mechs for all four players work fine if buyer wishes to collected revenue. Will ship via freight carrier at Buyer's expense. Local pickup allowed and encouraged (zip 31525). Local delivery (from Savannah down to Jacksonville) available for nominal fee.

ads.author: David David
ads.title: Restored Bram Stoker's Dracula Pinball for sale or trade
ads.description: Beautifully restored Bram Stoker's Dracula pinball machine for sale or trade. There was a lot of time and money that went into this machine. The cabinet has Radcals installed which look beautiful with a deep glossy shine. The inside of the cabinet was sanded down and painted black. An improved 6" woofer was installed in the cabinet. Anti glare invisible playfield glass. Blue LED start button. Custom color changing speaker lights. All the exterior trim is finished in a gloss black powder coat, including the coin door, legs, hinges, side rails, lockdown bar, lockdown bar receiver and coin box lid. On the playfield, all the metal ramps are finished in a dark blue metallic powder coat that looks really awesome. A custom coffin mod has been installed. Custom Target decals installed. A plasma mod has been installed in front of the coffin. LED lamps installed everywhere. Additional extra lighting installed. LED pop bumper covers. LED flipper buttons install installed. Tilt graphics side blades installed. Prototype slingshot plastics installed. Clear coin slots on the coin door with red LEDs. Color LCD DMD installed. Glow in the dark rubber installed. Black lightning flipper bats with silicone rubber. Custom apron cards. All original circuit boards with matching serial numbers. NVRAM installed so no need for batteries. The machine looks and plays great. It's a super fun machine for the entire family. If you're looking for a great machine for your collection, this would fit right in. Located in Lake Elsinore, California. Local delivery available. I can also ship this machine anywhere in the United States for $495 fully insured on a pallet. I have lots of experience making sure the machine will get to you safely. Lots of positive feedback and references available. Lots of additional photos available on Pinside (SoCalPinballs) Possible trade for other pinball machines.

ads.author: Izabella Stasicki McGuire
ads.title: NHL Open Ice pcb
ads.description: Up for sale is a mostly working NHL Open Ice pcb with some issues outlined below. Please make sure you know what you are getting: 1. This was originally an MK3 and was converted by the guy I bought it from. I recently had some issues with it where a couple of ROMs showed up red during checksum. I have not been able to replicate this issue and have posted a video of the checksum process here. It is possible that some roms will need to be replaced in the future - https://www.hobbyroms.com/ 2. The game would occasionally restart during gameplay which usually indicates a power supply issue. I am running this in a cabinet on a 4way switcher with other games, which sometimes results in voltage drops. I raised the voltage slightly and bypassed the switcher and the game has been running fine. I tested this a few times over the course of a week where I would go out to the garage and play a full game. This does not mean that you won't have this issue if the game is running for several hours. I only have so much time to dedicate to testing. Just want to make sure you know what you are getting. Thanks for looking

ads.author: Cliff Barr
ads.title: THE MANDALORIAN PREMIUM PINBALL MACHINE
ads.description: This Mandalorian Premium Pinball machine has been barely used by one owner with no children. I have played the machine about 15 times and it still has the plastic on the start button. All original paperwork is included. It is in new condition with no scratches or other defects. Buyer will need to setup movers for the machine. The Mandalorian Pinball Machine has a very full playfield with great shots, spell outs and easy to follow rules, which build to increasingly higher levels for better players. The Mandalorian has 3 flippers in total. The game has a spinning target and scoop & vuk on the left and a mini loop on the right. Shots and rules progressions are indicated with 18 RGB lights. GI lighting is enhanced with color changing LED’s. Custom speech is provided by actor Carl Weathers, who plays Greef Karga. The Ludwig Göransson The Mandalorian theme music envelops game play. Action is augmented with Season 1 and Season 2 videos. Additions and changes for the Premium/LE are substantial. The diverter on Encounter ramp still feeds the mini-playfield, but the mini-playfield is no longer just an area of the playfield. This mini-playfield is a motorized, separate playfield, moving from a 45 degree angle to parallel and above the playfield. Added is a 2nd flipper on the Encounter mini-playfield, making 4 flippers on Premium/LE games. There is an up-post at mini-playfield exit. Under The Child is a “Force” magnet to catch the ball and create exiting action. All ramps have chrome wire returns. The mini-loop on the right features a rule controlled dynamic up-down scoop loading an added wire ramp feeding the left ramp return.

ads.description: (Located in Lexington, KY) IGT Munsters Igame-plus Slant Top made in 2002. Has keys. Most door locks have been by by-passed to avoid “open door” error messages. Fully working with bright touch screen CRT monitor. Bets can be place via touch screen or cabinet buttons. Bill accepter works and is how you load credits. I have not even bothered to check the printer. So if you want to ‘cash out’ on a paper ticket you will need to buy some. I have about 12 but I did not feel like that was enough for testing. Continuous feed stacks of paper are available online and are inexpensive. Frankly, need to “cash out” is not You can add a coin mech option if you wish. This game is set on 1 penny per line play. Production of the Stern Munsters pinball machine has made this video slot even more sought after. No holds, beyond drive time. Cash upon pick-up. Trade for Pinball Machine(s) considered, solid state pinball machine only (that means ones made late 80’ to present... NO old electro mechanical machines) If it is up, I still have it. Generic “Is it available” question will be answered after all questions that seem to have actually interest are responded to. Pics include info from the original IGT ad slick.

ads.author: Jason Rainey
ads.title: Stern Star Wars Pinball Machine - Home Edition
ads.description: For sale is a Star Wars Home Edition Stern pinball machine in like new condition. All parts, lights, audio, and flippers are working perfectly. Sound has been upgraded, this machine features two front speakers and a subwoofer. The factory default for this machine is a single mono speaker with no subwoofer, so the sound upgrade makes a big difference to the audio. Machine comes with the owners manual and rule sheet. I am the original owner of this machine and it was purchased in April 2023 (manufactured in November 2022) and has only 353 total plays on it (see screen shot, as of May 25). It has been stored in doors in a smoke free and pet free home and features no cosmetic damage. Please note the Home Edition does not accept quarters, it stays on Free Play, just press the Start button to begin. Up to 4 players can play against each other and the game supports various multi-ball modes. Game is for local pickup only at my address, I cannot ship it or deliver it as I do not own a truck. Buyer can test the game and make sure they are satisfied with it before purchase, but once it leaves my house, all sales are final. Payment accepted through Cash App. Dimensions: 70 inches high, 28 inches wide, and 53 inches deep. The legs can be removed and the head of the machine can be folded down so that it can fit in the back of most vans or any truck. Machine weighs approximately 220 pounds.

ads.author: JP Nebres
ads.title: Stern Star Wars Pinball Machine
ads.description: Up for sale is an incredibly fun, fast-playing Stern Star Wars (Pro) pinball machine. This game has an awesome history—I purchased it directly off the show floor as a demo unit at a retro arcade convention in Los Angeles back in 2018. Immediately following the show, it came straight to my climate-controlled, 100% smoke-free home game room where it has lived a pampered, low-play life ever since. It is super clean, 100% fully functional, and shoots lightning-fast with that brutal and rewarding Steve Ritchie flow. Condition: Cabinet and playfield are exceptionally clean and well-maintained. Flippers are strong, magnets work perfectly, and the LCD display is flawless. Zero errors. Upgrades: Premium third-party interior art blades depicting the epic Death Star space battle, adding massive depth and style to the cabinet walls. Custom Millennium Falcon toy mod featuring interactive flashing LEDs that tie directly into the playfield action. Environment: Kept strictly in a dedicated, smoke-free, climate-controlled residential game room. If you are looking for an immersive Star Wars experience with incredible movie assets, deep risk/reward rule sets, and fantastic music/callouts, this is the one. Terms & Pickup Pickup: Local pickup only. Located in a ground-level residence with very easy access for loading (no tight corners or stairs). Loading: Please bring a friend and an appropriate vehicle (truck, SUV, or large crossover). I am happy to help fold down the head, wrap it, and assist with prep, but the buyer is responsible for moving and lifting. Payment: Cash or verified secure electronic payment at pickup. No trades at this time, as I'm taking a break from the hobby. Serious buyers only. Feel free to send a PM if you have questions or want to schedule a time to test fly it! Also up for sale is a Stern Star Wars Pro (2019), a Stern Avengers Infinity Quest Pro, a Gottleib Genie (needs work), an Atari System 1 cabinet with Marble Madness and Roadblasters, and an original Atari Star Wars (1981) with 6100 Ampliphone.

ads.author: JP Nebres
ads.title: The Mandalorian (Pro) Pinball by Stern
ads.description: Up for sale is a beautiful, meticulously cared-for Stern The Mandalorian (Pro) pinball machine. This game has been Home Use Only (HUO) since day one and has never seen commercial use or a public floor. It is in 100% pristine, completely stock condition—no permanent modifications or amateur hacks. Plays fast, smooth, and exactly as Stern intended. The only people to play it really are myself and my son 95% of the time. Condition: Mint cabinet, flawless playfield, and perfect plastics. Environment: Kept strictly in a 100% smoke-free, climate-controlled home and game room. Functionality: 100% working order. Shoots perfectly, lights are bright, and the flippers are strong. No errors or technical issues whatsoever. This is an incredible shooter that fights back with amazing callouts, immersive video assets, incredible hand-drawn artwork, and a beautifully punishing layout. Terms & Pickup Pickup: Local pickup only. Located in a residence with easy, ground-level access for loading (no crazy stairs to navigate). Loading: Please bring your own truck/SUV and a friend to help lift. I can help breakdown and prep the machine for transport, but buyers are responsible for heavy lifting. Payment: Cash or verified secure electronic payment at pickup. No trades at this time. I'm taking a break from the hobby. Also up for sale is a Stern Star Wars Pro (2019), a Stern Avengers Infinity Quest Pro, a Gottleib Genie (needs work), an Atari System 1 cabinet with Marble Madness and Roadblasters, and an original Atari Star Wars (1981) with 6100 Ampliphone.

ads.description: If the ad is up, it's available. Local pickup near Boiling Springs or Spartanburg SC. Electronic payments (Cash app, Venmo, etc) are not accepted. Cash only please. I had planned on restoring this arcade machine but life got in the way. It powers on and works to an extent but it needs TLC to get it fully functional. The picture convergence needs help. The jet ski needs an air compressor to make the ride functional which is missing so I never could test it. There's also a piece of aluminum trim on the left side of the jet ski that was missing when I got it. The Sega Model 2 inside has been replaced so the old one is included. You will need to bring a trailer with a ramp to load it. Both pieces are on wheels so it's relatively easy to move but very heavy.

ads.author: Daniel Schnoll
ads.title: Space Shuttle Pinball Machine
ads.description: For sale is my Space Shuttle Pinball Machine. I have done a number of upgrades and repairs to this game, including: - All new LEDs - Professionally serviced and repaired the MPU through Bill from Pinball Gallery to repair two blown transistors - Installed the Special Saver Board for the special solenoids to protect and future proof the MPU (see last pic) - Had two playfield solenoids professionally replaced (also by Bill from Pinball Gallery) - New vinyl decals on the spinner, drop targets, and main playfield logo - Sanded and painted the legs a semigloss black - New rubbers as needed Playfield is in serviceable condition, with notable wear around the center area. I have only dusted the playfield with a dry microfiber cloth to pick up dust and avoid further damaging the artwork. No wax or other cleaners have been applied. Cabinet is in serviceable condition as well. Plastics are original, as is the space shuttle playfield model, a desirable addition since the original model often breaks. I brought this game to Pinfest, but after setting up for the day on Thursday and being played all day Thursday and Friday, there now appears to be a problem with one of the pins on the plug for playfield lighting, which is preventing some of the lights from illuminating. I have dropped the price accordingly. WYSIWYG - selling as is, asking $1999 cash.

ads.description: Cactus Canyon LE. Limited Edition #1150 of 1250 produced, with Topper. Original owner and it is in perfect condition. I installed the Lyman Sheats update kit ($1250 from Chicago Gaming) which includes new expanded game code, the new saloon mech with swinging door, a ball bearing opto spinner, and a crossing sign ball lock indicator. If you haven't seen the new code, check out Joel @ Flip N Out Pinball's complete run through here (https://youtu.be/-sCym6l2FVM?si=VnodIJQGpNnnyMB2). It's a great addition that really turns it into an all new game. 11 plays since the Lyman code update, had approximately 25 plays before. Also includes the mirrored backglass from Planetary Pinball along with the original one and the custom playfield glass cover. Extras: Lyman kit $1,250 Mirrored back glass $300 Playfield glass protector $50 $1,600 in upgrades No trades, desperate for space. Located in Carson City NV Cash on the glass.

ads.author: Tayllor Lucas
ads.title: Rare Starfighter Arcade Game by Karateco (Moon Cresta) Project Machine
ads.description: This is Starfighter by Karateco, which is a version of Moon Cresta with the different sets of enemies all swapped around. This variation of cabinet is very difficult to track down, and this machine spent most of it's time in Hawaii (as indicated on the plates inside of the coin door). When I got it, this cabinet was converted to something else and I have been slowly obtaining the correct parts to convert it back. Along with being converted, the whole cabinet was also painted blue. I safely stripped the sides mostly clean, except for touch ups around the bolts. The front still needs stripped, though. The Good - It's in good shape aside from the back door and upper back edge. - The side art is still in good shape - The rare coin door is still intact - I have the correct 2-way joystick that comes with it. The Medium Ground - The board was sold to me working, but was stated the sound amp on the PCB needed to be replaced. I've not tested it. - Judging from what little of the original harness is there, the monitor was a Sanyo EZ20. - Speaker is missing a terminal, but I can supply another. The Bad - Needs a monitor - Needs a harness made (Galaxian) - Needs a power supply It's honestly a quick project, I just have a lot on my plate. I can ship with Fastenal, or work with whoever you choose. Local pickup is fine, whatever works for you. PM me for more pictures than Facebook allows, if you're interested.

Only issue at all are two very small nicks on the right glass rail edge. Coin door is basically mint and has the original decals on it. Legs are all very nice as well, levelers are brand new. Back glass is literally mint, and the LCD display is crisp and has no dead or stuck pixels at all. Playfield is nearly perfect as well with the only notable flaw being a chip on the back cover of the book near the upper right side of the book LCD area. Playfield is absolutely excellent otherwise with basically zero wear. It is glass smooth, shiny, freshly waxed, and very clean with no fading. Drop areas are all in excellent condition and still have the factory mylars present. The playfield decals and drop target decals are all mint as well. All beasts work perfectly and still look great. A few have some paint rub from the balls bashing them, but no chips/cracks, etc. The game is running the latest game code and cleaned top to bottom. CMOS battery was replaced on the motherboard and computer was cleaned well and is free of dust. All Titan silicone rings were installed throughout the entire game. Brand new 12v lighting installed including the spotlights and coin door lights. Smaug has a brand new wiring harness, new eye LEDs, and a new servo. He works perfectly, looks fantastic, and is adjusted properly. This machine has clearly been cared for properly and it shows. Includes a printed and professionally bound full color manual that is much larger and easier to read than the factory manual. Also includes a spare set of playfield mylars for the pop bumper area and beasts but they were never needed. This game needs absolutely nothing. Just turn it on and enjoy it. Jersey jack makes some amazing immersive games, and this is definitely yet another masterpiece. Please see my pinside ad for more photos since Facebook is very limited: https://pinside.com/pinball/market/classifieds/ad/214898 Price negotiable. Willing to ship - buyer is responsible for setting this up and paying. Willing to deliver within 1 hour of Pittsburgh for a reasonable fee. Stairs and limited access are additional. Due to the weight of this game, I am unable to do stairs though. It is around 350 lbs and I am not strong enough for that.

ads.author: Clifton Pennington
ads.title: Vintage Penny game. It is an ABT Challenger from 1925!
ads.description: Experience the thrill of vintage arcade excitement with the 1925 A.B.T. mfg co Challenger 1 Cent Penny Arcade Target Shooting Game. A true collector's piece, this original coin-op shooting game hails from the United States, where it was meticulously crafted to provide hours of entertainment. Its timeless design and historical value make it a standout addition to any collection. Delve into the golden age of arcade gaming with this classic non-video arcade machine. The year 1925 marks a period when arcade games were the epitome of social entertainment, and this piece embodies that era. Whether you're a seasoned collector or new to the world of vintage arcade games, the Challenger offers a glimpse into a bygone period of fun and skill. Others selling for over 1k.
